narrative:
Deer Park 3-A (precinct in Hamilton County) has 997 registered voters, with 59.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.5%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.7 percentage points.
